rubric_sheet.title: Career Presentation Peer Review
rubric_sheet.purpose_line: Use fair, respectful, and specific feedback.

criteria.name: Clear speaking
criteria.descriptor: The presenter spoke clearly enough for the audience to follow.

criteria.name: Organization
criteria.descriptor: The presentation was organized and easy to follow.

criteria.name: Evidence
criteria.descriptor: Examples or details helped the audience understand the point.

success_criteria: I gave fair and respectful feedback.
